title: melaleuca linearis var. pinifolia
intro: Melaleuca linearis var. pinifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved tea tree, is a subspecies of the Melaleuca linearis plant, native to Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which has antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Melaleuca linearis var. pinifolia include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as tea, essential oil, and salves, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
